title: Making Beverages
description: 1.Players run a milk tea shop,there are a variety of milk tea,make you feel colorful,you can add more ingredients in a cup of milk tea. 2.Let your customers enjoy the unique taste,feel the unique charm and play.
instructions: 1 Players run a milk tea shop there are a variety of milk tea make you feel colorful you can add more ingredients in a cup of milk tea 2 Different materials with different milk tea to create a unique taste of milk tea
